'''âh-zh-zh-l''' ('''kahazheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:antiquarianize|antiquarianize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:antiquarianize|antiquarianize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-zh-zh-l
|-
! Lemma
| kahazheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihazheloko|thihazheloko]] || [[word:jihazheloko|jihazheloko]] || [[word:shihazheloko|shihazheloko]] || [[word:kihazheloko|kihazheloko]]
